title: koeleria phleoides f. maritima
intro: Koeleria phleoides f. maritima, also known as coastal koeleria or maritima grass, is a subspecies of the Koeleria phleoides plant, a type of perennial grass native to various parts of the world. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Koeleria phleoides f. maritima include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
